theme: The Role of Luck in Success

sentences.english: How much do you think luck plays a role in success?
sentences.korean: 성공에서 운이 얼마나 역할을 한다고 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I believe luck plays a larger role in success than most people are willing to admit.
sentences.korean: 대부분의 사람이 인정하려는 것보다 운이 성공에 더 큰 역할을 한다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Where you were born who your parents are and what opportunities happen to come your way are all matters of luck.
sentences.korean: 어디서 태어났는지 부모가 누구인지 어떤 기회가 오는지는 모두 운의 문제예요.

sentences.english: However luck alone isn't enough — you also need hard work and preparation to take advantage of lucky opportunities when they arise.
sentences.korean: 하지만 운만으로는 충분하지 않아요 — 행운의 기회가 올 때 이를 활용하려면 노력과 준비도 필요해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone
A Hobby You Want to Start
A Festival or Event You Attended
The Role of Luck in Success

theme: The Role of Luck in Success

sentences.english: As the saying goes luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
sentences.korean: 격언처럼 행운은 준비가 기회를 만날 때 일어나는 거예요.

sentences.english: So while we can't control luck we can always control how prepared we are.
sentences.korean: 운은 통제할 수 없지만 얼마나 준비되어 있는지는 항상 통제할 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: The Role of Luck in Success
A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life
The Best Age to Learn a Language
